name: rose-forest-tests
_comment_pin_2026-05-26: @holochain/client and @holochain/tryorama versions investigated 2026-05-26 in WSL holonix (hc 0.6.1). Findings: NO tryorama version pairs cleanly with hc 0.6.1. tryorama 0.17 expects a separate hc-sandbox binary not present in hc 0.6.x. tryorama 0.18 expects `hc sandbox network webrtc` (only `mem`/`quic` in 0.6.1) AND `ConfigRootPath(...)` stdout (now `DataRootPath(...)`). tryorama 0.19 sends a request shape conductor 0.6.1 cannot deserialize. crates.io latest holochain_cli is 0.7.0-dev.26 — the 0.6 line is EOL upstream. Tryorama-based tests require migrating the substrate to holonix main-0.7-dev OR writing a custom test harness against @holochain/client directly. ADR-12 + MVP_PLAN.md updated to reflect this on 2026-05-26. See docs/agent-memory/project/holochain-version-line-skew.md. Pinned to 0.18.3/0.19.3 as the closest pair to the 0.6 line; this gets past installApp but fails at sandbox network create.
